title: Changelog entries get their PR number automatically
summary: Every changelog entry now reliably links its pull request — the number is stamped into the entry when the PR merges, with no extra commit from you.
highlights: PR number is written into the entry at merge, so the repo matches what's published
Pull requests are verified at PR time — a numberless or malformed entry fails CI, not the live deploy
The deploy-time resolver remains a safety net for anything merged outside the normal flow
